extraction.one_line_summary: TRENTIN Matteo won Madrid sprint with Quick-Step leadout after breakaway caught inside 1km, taking his fourth stage win.
tactical_patterns: FROOME Chris contested intermediate sprint specifically to defend green jersey from TRENTIN's four stage wins.
Quick-Step controlled final kilometer timing perfectly, catching three-rider break just before launch point for TRENTIN.
Team Sky executed full team control during ceremonial stage to prevent TRENTIN taking points jersey despite dominance.

rider_signals.TRENTIN Matteo: positive: four stage wins demonstrates best sprint form but team didn't prioritize intermediate points for jersey
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: positive: targeted intermediate sprint tactically to secure green jersey rather than concede to specialist
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: neutral: participated in three-rider breakaway on ceremonial stage showing professional race engagement
rider_signals.DE MARCHI Alessandro: neutral: animated final stage breakaway suggesting recovery after three-week effort
rider_signals.MANZIN Lorrenzo: positive: second place finish marks FDJ's best result after difficult Vuelta campaign
